column1: Tue, 30 Apr 2002 09:23:55 -0700 (PDT),cheryl.johnson@enron.com,"chris.abel@enron.com, laurel.adams@enron.com,",Name Changes 04/30/02,"The following name changes were completed in Global Counterparty this morning.
For details, click on the following link, then click FETCH, to view.
Shortname changes will be made on Friday, May 3, 2002.
Inactivations for March and April will also be made on Friday, May 3, 2002.
Additionally, the following shortname changes will be made on Friday, May 3.  These are on the April 2002 report.
Please let me know if there are any questions or concerns.
